description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a deploy stage with a pages job. The pages job runs on the default Docker image, sets the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive, and executes the exact script commands: mkdir .public, sed "s/##ANALYTICS_ID##/$ANALYTICS_ID/g" -i index.html, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public. It publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact and is restricted to the master branch using an only rule. No services, caches, or additional deployment targets are configured.
